name: Crisis Wing
short_description: Crisis Wing is 90's style vertically scrolling arcade shooter. Master 7 intense vertical stages, and take down massive bosses. Play solo or with a friend in local co-op. Get ready for pure, high-octane action.
detailed_description:
Crisis Wing combines the frantic, high-octane action of arcade classics with modern features and polished gameplay. Featuring authentic 16-bit visuals and a head-banging FM soundtrack, this is the vertical shoot 'em up you've been waiting for.

  • 7 Intense Stages: Fight through a series of challenging levels, each with unique enemies and massive bosses.

  • Upgradable Weapons: Power up your ship with three unique weapons and special sub-weapons to sow a wake of destruction in your path.

  • Local Co-op: Team up with a friend and double the firepower to tackle the game together.

  • Bonus Modes: Test your limits in the challenging Boss Rush and Score Attack modes, or perfect your run in Practice Mode with infinite lives.

  • Authentic Feel: Enable CRT filters for a truly old-school arcade experience.

Get ready and blast off your thusters, the galaxy needs you!

App Version 1.2.2 - Dec 29, 2025
